V-258703.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must have copy operations disabled.
V-258703.FindingDetails: Verified isolation.tools.copy.disable is set to true or does not exist (default-safe).
V-258703.ManualRemediationNote: Set isolation.tools.copy.disable = true via PowerCLI or vSphere Client. VM must be cold-started for setting to take effect.

V-258704.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must have drag and drop operations disabled.
V-258704.FindingDetails: Verified isolation.tools.dnd.disable is set to true or does not exist (default-safe).

V-258705.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must have paste operations disabled.
V-258705.FindingDetails: Verified isolation.tools.paste.disable is set to true or does not exist (default-safe).

V-258706.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must have virtual disk shrinking disabled.
V-258706.FindingDetails: Verified isolation.tools.diskShrink.disable is set to true or does not exist (default-safe).

V-258707.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must have virtual disk wiping disabled.
V-258707.FindingDetails: Verified isolation.tools.diskWiper.disable is set to true or does not exist (default-safe).

V-258708.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must limit console sharing.
V-258708.ManualRemediationNote: Set RemoteDisplay.maxConnections = 1. Must exist (missing is a finding).

V-258709.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must limit informational messages from the virtual machine to the VMX file.
V-258709.FindingDetails: Verified tools.setinfo.sizeLimit is set to 1048576 or does not exist (default-safe).

V-258710.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must prevent unauthorized removal, connection, and modification of devices.
V-258710.FindingDetails: Verified isolation.device.connectable.disable is set to true or does not exist (default-safe).

V-258711.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must not be able to obtain host information from the hypervisor.
V-258711.FindingDetails: Verified tools.guestlib.enableHostInfo is set to false or does not exist (default-safe).

V-258712.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must have shared salt values disabled.
V-258712.FindingDetails: Verified sched.mem.pshare.salt setting does not exist.
V-258712.ManualRemediationNote: Remove sched.mem.pshare.salt setting: Get-VM | Get-AdvancedSetting -Name sched.mem.pshare.salt | Remove-AdvancedSetting

V-258713.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must disable access through the dvfilter network API.
V-258713.ManualRemediationNote: If dvfilter is not in use, remove any ethernet*.filter*.name settings via PowerCLI.

V-258714.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must be configured to lock when the last console connection is closed.
V-258714.FindingDetails: Verified tools.guest.desktop.autolock is set to true or does not exist (Windows-only; NA elsewhere).
V-258714.ManualRemediationNote: Windows VMs only: set tools.guest.desktop.autolock = true via PowerCLI.

V-258715.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must disable 3D features when not required.
V-258715.FindingDetails: Verified mks.enable3d is set to false or does not exist (default-safe).
V-258715.ManualRemediationNote: Set mks.enable3d = false for VMs that do not require 3D.

V-258716.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must enable encryption for vMotion.
V-258716.FindingDetails: Verified MigrateEncryption is set to opportunistic or required.
V-258716.ManualRemediationNote: Edit VM Options >> Encryption; set Encrypted vMotion to Opportunistic or Required.

V-258717.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must enable encryption for Fault Tolerance.

CheckParams.NA_Reason: Fault Tolerance is not enabled for this VM.

V-258717.FindingDetails: Verified FtEncryptionMode is set to Opportunistic or Required.
V-258717.ManualRemediationNote: If FT is enabled, set Encrypted FT to Opportunistic or Required via VM Options >> Encryption.

V-258718.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must configure log size.
V-258718.FindingDetails: Verified log.rotateSize is set to 2048000 or does not exist (default-safe).

V-258719.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must configure log retention.
V-258719.FindingDetails: Verified log.keepOld is set to 10 or does not exist (default-safe).

V-258720.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must enable logging.
V-258720.FindingDetails: Verified logging is enabled for this VM.
V-258720.ManualRemediationNote: Edit VM Options >> Advanced; check 'Enable logging'.

V-258721.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must not use independent, nonpersistent disks.
V-258721.FindingDetails: Verified no disks are configured as IndependentNonPersistent.
V-258721.ManualRemediationNote: Change disk mode to Persistent or IndependentPersistent via Edit Settings.

V-258722.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must remove unneeded floppy devices.
V-258722.FindingDetails: Verified no floppy devices are attached.
V-258722.ManualRemediationNote: Remove floppy drive via PowerCLI: Get-VM 'name' | Get-FloppyDrive | Remove-FloppyDrive. VM must be powered off.

V-258723.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must remove unneeded CD/DVD devices.
V-258723.FindingDetails: Verified no CD/DVD drives are connected (disconnected drives are acceptable).
V-258723.ManualRemediationNote: Disconnect CD/DVD media: Get-VM 'name' | Get-CDDrive | Set-CDDrive -NoMedia.

V-258724.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must remove unneeded parallel devices.
V-258724.FindingDetails: Verified no parallel devices are attached.
V-258724.ManualRemediationNote: Remove parallel port via PowerCLI ReconfigVM spec. VM must be powered off.

V-258725.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must remove unneeded serial devices.
V-258725.FindingDetails: Verified no serial devices are attached.
V-258725.ManualRemediationNote: Remove serial port via Edit Settings. VM must be powered off.

V-258726.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must remove unneeded USB devices.
V-258726.FindingDetails: Verified no USB devices or controllers are attached. Exception: documented smart card readers.
V-258726.ManualRemediationNote: Remove USB controller via Edit Settings. Smart card readers passed through VM console are exempt.

V-258727.Title: Virtual machines (VMs) must disable DirectPath I/O devices when not required.
V-258727.FindingDetails: Verified no DirectPath I/O (PCI passthrough) devices are attached.
V-258727.ManualRemediationNote: Remove PCI passthrough device: Get-VM 'name' | Get-PassthroughDevice | Remove-PassthroughDevice. Document any approved exceptions.
